title: Hypr Network - REKT
relevance_summary: Bridge exploit using reinitialized contract to bypass finalizeERC20Withdrawal check

prevention.rule: Block any tx that reinitializes a contract and calls finalizeERC20Withdrawal() in the same transaction.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that reinitializes a contract and calls finalizeERC20Withdrawal() in the same transaction.
summary: Hypr Network lost 2.57M HYPR (~$220k) to a bridge exploit due to a critical vulnerability in the OP monorepo develop branch. A reinitialized contract was used to bypass the finalizeERC20Withdrawal check, highlighting the importance of staying updated with security patches.
